units.lean_file_body:
open Matrix Finset BigOperators

namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics
namespace Det

variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K]
variable {n : ℕ}

theorem det_of_triangular (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular id ∨ A.BlockTriangular (OrderDual.toDual : Fin n → Fin n)) : A.det = ∏ i : Fin n, A i i := by
  rcases h with (hU | hL)
  · exact Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular hU
  · exact Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular A hL

end Det
end AlgebraicCombinatorics
notes: Uses the checked Mathlib signatures for Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular and Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular, which require BlockTriangular condition rather than explicit zero conditions.
The theorem combines both upper and lower triangular cases using an `or` hypothesis.
Added explicit variable declarations for K and n to satisfy typeclass requirements.
used_context: source theorem text: triangular matrix determinant equals product of diagonal entries
local_file_context_candidates: open Matrix Finset BigOperators, namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics, namespace Det, variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K], variable {n m : ℕ}
